## Summary

- Describe the user-facing and technical changes in this PR

## Validation

- [ ] Frontend build passes
- [ ] Backend build passes
- [ ] Backend tests pass
- [ ] Admin build passes or is unaffected

## Branching

- [ ] Base branch is `develop` unless this is a production hotfix
- [ ] Branch name follows `feature/*`, `bugfix/*`, `hotfix/*`, or `release/*`

## Standards

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `refactor:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)
- [ ] Environment variables and secrets were not committed
- [ ] Changes keep frontend and backend app boundaries clean
